case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. STARVING STUDENTS INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS INC.
DECLARATION OF ERIKA SANCHEZ & RUBEN CONTRERAS RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-16-2003 CONTINUED TO JUL-11-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT (S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-11-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-16-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-17-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-01-2003
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JAN-29-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS INC.
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $170.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS INC.
DECLARATION OF SHARON D. PENNA (SUBRO) RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS INC.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY CLARK SHANNON, COLLEEN
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS INC. $2,941.37 PRINCIPAL, $174.00 INTEREST, $170.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,285.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
